title: PLU Logo
output: Print out the PLU logo as shown below.

PPPPPP  L       U    U
P    P  L       U    U
PPPPPP  L       U    U

++++++++++++++++++++++

source: School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2012, Novice, School, PLU High School Programming Contest, PLU 2019, Novice
